# chat
Local AI chat interface using Ollama/llama.cpp

## Usage
```
bun install
bun preview
```

## Features
- [X] Sending messages and streaming responses
- [X] Choosing between multiple models running locally
- [X] Saving conversations
- [X] Extended thinking for better answers
- [X] Image uploads
- [ ] Accounts
